Student Life

Life at Global Technical College goes beyond the classroom, helping students build connections, leadership skills, and lasting friendships.

Clubs & Societies

Life at Global Technical College goes beyond the classroom. Students join communities, develop leadership skills, and create lasting connections.

Events

Students can participate in various clubs and societies that encourage creativity, teamwork, and leadership.

Alumni Network

Our alumni community continues to support graduates with networking opportunities and career guidance.

About Global Technical College

  • Started in 2015
  • Over 100 Courses
  • Over 10000 Alumnis

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills. They have gained skills in fields like ICT, Business, Electrical Engineering, and Hospitality, preparing them for meaningful careers in Kenya and beyond.

We are more than just a technical college. We are a launchpad for opportunity. With qualified instructors, hands-on training, modern facilities, and a supportive community, we guide each student from where they are to where they want to be.

EMPOWERMENT THROUGH SKILL

We equip students with practical, industry-relevant skills that open doors to employment and entrepreneurship.

INTEGRITY & ACCOUNTABILITY

We operate with honesty, transparency, and a strong commitment to student success.

EXCELLENCE

From our training to our facilities, we maintain high standards to ensure the best learning experience.

INCLUSIVITY

We welcome students from diverse backgrounds and provide a supportive environment where everyone can grow.

School Life

Experience Vibrant School Life

Connect, grow, and thrive through campus activities, student communities, and memorable experiences at Global Technical College.

Build the skills that shape your future.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.

Our Programs

School of Business

Learn entrepreneurship, finance, marketing, and business management skills needed to run or support modern businesses.

Learn More >

School of ICT

Master computer systems, networking, cybersecurity, and digital technologies powering today’s world.

Learn More>

School of Electrical Engineering

Gain hands-on training in electrical systems, wiring, and industrial installations.

Learn More >

School of Hospitality

Develop practical skills in customer service, food service, housekeeping, and event management.

Learn More

School of Hairdressing

Combine creativity and technical skill to master styling, beauty therapy, and salon management.

Learn More >

School of English

Improve fluency and communication skills for professional environments and international opportunities.

Learn More >

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.
